textByHashes.189e6faf600e43156b433784ee1d4a818b3c9d97: Adventurer! It is good to see you again.
textByHashes.ffcab1d19c25bf1a5e4f16007ef3357ad3449ce5: The tree? It is fine, as it has always been since we foiled Glough's plans.
textByHashes.48efeebeafccb34f162db81bbd14d329594b276f: Oh, I forced him to resign. I have now appointed a new Head Tree Guardian, Daero. He is learning quickly and serves me well.
textByHashes.8910c7349abe805d9e4ffe8f243a30f3b4304879: Nothing in particular ... Well actually, yes - there is.
textByHashes.8a21b83b3b225af2dd6998f357a8156f8b8ba013: Well, do you remember Glough's ship building facilities in Karamja?
textByHashes.e467bf30c8ddfb543aa6f1cef6ad09def9891779: After you defeated Glough's demon I sent an envoy of my Royal Guard, the 10th squad, to oversee the decommission of the shipyard. They were ordered to use force if necessary.
textByHashes.7591684cdd94a034eecd1e8da94b4475a40a33f4: I ... I don't know. I have heard nothing from them. I do not even know if they reached the shipyard!
textByHashes.d687c62117dea94fd2e17aa1588233234d07da3e: But I need to know what happened. These are elite soldiers - their disappearance cannot simply be ignored. I cannot wait any longer.
textByHashes.e45033636ebd3de5a5d8a7b8e8ec548f6113052b: And so I ask you: would you visit Glough's old shipyard in Karamja and find out if the 10th squad ever managed to reach?
textByHashes.3e8df9f97d54cc126e4dbf7934736049d16b095d: Thank you very much. You may need this Royal Seal to identify yourself as my envoy.
textByHashes.77cd1adb434ef24591a7c1dd1e344366538bfbb6: Please report to me as soon as you have any information.
textByHashes.3af91767de4f17c5e01e8d24f0e22709481b669d: As you wish. Return to me when you have the time.
textByHashes.c0edb7a0c09ff69689634408a338f0510c072605: Are you ready to investigate the shipyard for me?
textByHashes.bbefb3e12850bdc98d19106cd125222b37f8d6e9: Go to Glough's old shipyard on the eastern coast of Karamja. Find out what happened to the 10th squad of my Royal Guard.
textByHashes.d0f7adabcb564009e8c3f9e22873656449bd34ec: As I said, they were sent to oversee the decommission of the ship building facilities, but I have heard nothing from them.
textByHashes.3f8044ce2296b8a8fc2db2fa714aab194378fafa: They would have each flown a Gnome Glider.
textByHashes.11117779f6fc130439c5b2779421877af1ef92c3: Thank you for doing this. What did you find?
textByHashes.b070a6e2e06abe670bc42d707045f0dbea8aee7b: The name sounds a little familiar, but it is nobody I know personally.
textByHashes.755eed03706329642ac70d95d5b92b253edff4bd: Never mind that - did you find anything out about my 10th squad?
textByHashes.1446a6c20c93bd1285be28e81460264128e443da: Very well. I will now prepare some orders. You must convey them to my new High Tree Guardian, Daero.
textByHashes.ea32de3f11da30de1b67c684aaae5946a00c37dc: You will find him attending to business somewhere on the Grand Tree.
textByHashes.d47d848c22ae00852ccb7cd761475926f0ee22e0: Oh, it often happens. Luckily I had the foresight to write in a secret code on self-destructing paper.
textByHashes.165baedaf43e48f68f78a9c02d115e703b8c616c: Yes? How is the mission going ... it has been quite some time since I sent you on your way.
textByHashes.a0a0a7626d180351ff7b2efc37f9dda41c45ef88: Yes, alright. Report on what happened.
textByHashes.9c8b76be8ba7105e1d482c35bee4a49fb8058dd9: Well, now. It appears I cannot argue with that. Garkor obviously thinks highly of you, as do I.
textByHashes.60dcdde5c66c2a59e1943249f569d9db2282852a: No service such as what you have done for me goes unrewarded in my kingdom. I personally made a visit to the Royal Treasury to withdraw your reward.
textByHashes.93c070d889e9d8c60ffb3fddc90a7773f3a0cf2d: So you're officially a member of the 10th squad then?
textByHashes.e6884f2accf5631cb2908042241472daea64b5fe: Well then you had better sign up for training.
textByHashes.0ab46f357393330893d65ef4364735351dbb9872: Yes. All members of the Royal Guard must complete a mandatory training programme.
textByHashes.ee522a8969caceb30f39b7321457337e0d95764e: The High Tree Guardian Daero is in charge of the training programme. You should know where to find him by now.
textByHashes.a90e1fc4f1fcef256771a4feacefe3e448a8b47e: Good of you to stop by, human.
textByHashes.a056c71fede9dfa9b754adc3fb13892311e191f1: Everything seems fine, as far as I can tell... I will let you know if there is any trouble.
textByHashes.0ee7833dfd8f4ca93e6346a121611963625a1e04: All is not well, . Despite having had Glough under close surveillance since the events on Ape Atoll, he has managed to escape the Stronghold.
textByHashes.28a53c4bfd3ee64d1dc264301e1b8143f550395d: I know you have already done so much for our kingdom, but could you look into Glough's disappearance?
textByHashes.9aff74ae395eace1f23e00b6b2db4611484c959e: You should look anywhere Glough may have left behind clues of his whereabouts. I've already had my men search his home, but perhaps you can find something they missed.
textByHashes.068e20832a044482aef995a541046ed21d366a58: Excellent, do you have it with you?
textByHashes.cd0839ff2931591e81e61bd6f71017079f6ffc7c: Ah, I see that it is written in the ancient gnome language... Perhaps you could translate it with that translation book you've used before?
textByHashes.e950a1bc2105a0fe718fca50aa4f5cf2132a098f: It is true that the translation guide is incomplete... Perhaps it would be of more use to go to the author directly?
textByHashes.d97a00ed5714d6a561127f50c85f00b4340580f1: What!? Who could have committed such a crime? Show me the note.
textByHashes.0cf65f0cc3d44128da482fd88db2447f8b41b0ce: The note refers to a replacement pilot, we've only had one pilot reassigned recently and that's Lori taking over Le Smith's post as a balloon pilot.
textByHashes.509cead59463f9b74d19b2b72814e8d7f2e031b6: , you must find out where Glough might have travelled to. Assistant Lori may be able to help.
textByHashes.edd1da9f8cbb71001e60dead950e33a0c053e195: Have you been able to find out where Glough has gone,
textByHashes.172c524052f5b6aae9220fa785496d059f09f349: Please hurry, . Glough is very dangerous and must be stopped!
textByHashes.931aaa0a233c5d3fedd51b26858f8bad97525ac8: Agh! We were foolish to allow him to stay here after dismissing him from the glider regiment.
textByHashes.b02f27a0536d6a303705031c849f2c7d972b3a70: Glough must be working with the monkeys once again. Fortunately, the rest of the 10th squad remained on Ape Atoll after your previous mission, they have been keeping a close eye on Awowogei.
textByHashes.674aa4a4458c35c28b080770777035e99f4faa6b: Perhaps they will have spotted something out of the ordinary that could help indicate what Glough is doing.
textByHashes.729f59571cebb1a224411b244c90af557e17654f: Glough is a threat to us all... I must hereby re-assign you to Ape Atoll, . Report to Sergeant Garkor on Ape Atoll for further orders.
textByHashes.4a3d0e52b9e8e48ee9a638661098cf3a351d46bb: I have given you orders, . Report to Sergeant Garkor on Ape Atoll for further instruction.
textByHashes.6ed8066d78e692c840bed0458f2bd3c59ec83dab: Evacuate? I think you're overreacting... My troops can handle Glough.
textByHashes.be0277515d2ac47b2fd1019f2fa6020a025e3e36: This is bad... I will put the troops on high alert. And... Well, we do have someone else who may be able to help...
textByHashes.a9dae8826f7caaad0f5d3fa623aed4d878a3093d: Nieve is the most highly skilled warrior we have here, get her assistance and defend the Stronghold.
textByHashes.d0a4672a8eb1441afd052c45cd64d9318e2ec35e: Get Nieve and defend the Stronghold, !
textByHashes.a56f5a9fdbc27326ebdab0be9305788ab83e4c55: Good work, , my troops can take it from here. You and Nieve should investigate the crash site.
textByHashes.6fbca106e546d511953d6f6c0423443a4a12f492: This is excellent news, . Where is Nieve?
textByHashes.2f108b293f955889363b9b4f52fc111d0d5dbaf2: Her sacrifice will not be forgotten.
textByHashes.b7a02e2567d63da1723a2d89e5060fd7700c3f0d: I have received word from monkey messengers that Awowogei himself wishes to make a visit to the Stronghold...
textByHashes.44f17fa5e4473f2637caaf6714484fb1ef38d571: Apparently he wishes to set up an agreement of peace between Ape Atoll and the mainland.
textByHashes.24f346d22ebf7f1c223360e936f898bc26f2c151: I don't have a choice. It would be foolish to decline such an offer, there may not be many more opportunities for peace between our kingdoms.
textByHashes.619448aabe293a29e804505e8149638812a5a922: Rest, , you have earned it. I will have you summoned when the peace agreement is complete, you should be present during a moment of such historic importance.
textByHashes.5dd39e758caa16405bffedf2caf0eb724ce3c68a: Awowogei has allowed us to set up a Gnome glider route to Marim, you are welcome to use it as you wish.
textByHashes.0af53c7d8205d7d667bc052cac40911bff382643: On behalf of the Gnomes I can only thank you, .
textByHashes.e43157baf86683a5eed0d7f4d3967ce5a8fe6003: Please accept this gift as a token of our gratitude for your services to our people.
textByHashes.8ac2c92fcafed6f4c078517656469b42da0b5206: This is one of my personal seed pods, handed down through the generations of my family.
textByHashes.392071f574c3d6d61df76601586d55f9a5b0b5d7: Simply commune with a pod and you'll be teleported right here to the Grand Tree.
textByHashes.09062a2a9c5803bde4555af80b8858976f6aa708: Why yes! Do you know what's going on?
textByHashes.688b80a314191a939c41b94c766beb6194cab21e: Glouphrie! Now we know what he has been up to all these years. Gah! Never trust a Mage.
textByHashes.2ca6957e8fcd2b1eebae1e08f3e0bd94a260e690: Harumph! Well, all of these creatures must be removed, we cannot allow the Arposandrans to spy on us any more. How many of these things are there?
textByHashes.e84cfecd75c3569790168801a5e7474a7c8f2fe5: Well find them all and dispatch them now.
textByHashes.c09609d9f1d667998e8abdea34a89a355c9671b4: Have you found all of those spies yet?
textByHashes.939b9b4d1585fb3ba0af38264d6847d745c27301: Thank goodness. Thank you for your help. Brimstail also tells me that you helped him a lot finding out what was going on!
textByHashes.dc1188cc2a533a6065902cc990daf3ce717371e2: Aha! Getting others to do the donkey work seems to be a skill that Mages develop well.
textByHashes.039e76e21833eb53c2a370b998f918c454c36e52: Well, I have many things to think about. Why are the Arposandrans spying on us, and what are they planning?
textByHashes.465f44a0faf62be26ff4b58f717b2831a1b2d179: Indeed, that is another thing that worries me...
textByHashes.ff6d49284f15a86b2536bd2485fabe0b4ff7030f: That may well be useful. Thank you – I may well call for your help again.
textByHashes.34c3cb58833deee09431577385d83d6f4e762b57: Oh, before you leave – I have something you might like.
textByHashes.1be7bb49f884248be1108fb1bb6c94b0327006e0: It was passed down to me from King to King. It belonged to Oaknock. He proclaimed that only a hero of the gnomes should have it. I think you count as a hero. Also since you have been looking into Oaknock you
textByHashes.23948e175e9f0f5c989b39526a8a5043e686cdf1: might be able to work out what it is.
textByHashes.90c2243ad1857759a05c96e5d2f66bf4810d608e: Well, I'm sure that your magical research skills will help you there. Good luck!
textByHashes.657621aff6f7051db04182ee9faf32b8129a28a8: Welcome Traveller. I am King Narnode. It's nice to see an outsider.
textByHashes.286261ed4e3cfa63d46d186dd52b016a5e1603c8: Traveller, can I speak to you in strictest confidence?
textByHashes.a3804443d2a5e8cfa3001bdd40c366682e51bc83: Not here, follow me. Down here.
textByHashes.cf9d3344869a6e8b0f4e81addb87d9a6ec982c75: Enjoy your stay with us. There are many things to see in my kingdom.
textByHashes.e1af1de79121f0f7e37d44b82917b29351f55829: These, my friend, are the foundations of the stronghold.
textByHashes.e176b6bf053aa63dcb0cf53d780d42f859e37b5a: Not just any roots Traveller! These were created by gnome mages eons ago, since then they have grown to become a mighty stronghold!
textByHashes.2ac536bc5d8bb14d7754eefe21ab2fdc0cb0ef77: In the last two months our tree guardians have reported continuing deterioration of the Grand Tree's health. I've never seen this before! It could be the end for us all!
textByHashes.45e2227801803b8b5b53b138088bbf33d50d319d: In effect yes. Would you be willing to help us discover what is happening to the tree?
textByHashes.ed1907497103f40132d03b2d4e3e2175bb47c499: I understand Traveller. Please keep this to yourself.
textByHashes.50bf1661a4bee5c97e87d460a531474cb7d21998: I'll show you the way back up.
textByHashes.f452683a34c2cc44830fb5ed708345bae540aca5: Thank Guthix for your arrival! The first task is to find out what's killing the tree.
textByHashes.01ba0db4a81b6bd28d5d0560bc049254b9176df9: My top tree guardian, Glough, believes it's human sabotage. I'm not so sure! The only way to know for sure is to talk to Hazelmere.
textByHashes.86c3aa5ff990af2a898c59d9b1fa7b65f1ce7321: Hazelmere is one of the mages that created the Grand Tree. He is the only one that has survived from that time. Take this bark sample to him, he will be able to help!
textByHashes.67506574356f7be17d454fb32e026c2017c7cdb3: The mage only talks in the old tongue, you'll need this.
textByHashes.2e7bb1d382e3a0c554a6c262f2565b54b814e33e: It's a translation book, you'll need it to translate what Hazelmere says. Do that carefully! His words are our only hope! You'll find his dwellings high upon a towering hill, on an island east of Yanille. I'll show you the way back up. Up here.
textByHashes.ce94d671af92970ac6e539e50f8a33dcce68a0a1: Here's another sample, hang on to it this time!
textByHashes.1e937ef9434bd5d778a2c1a9bcaa9bdc014bc3b3: Hazelmere lives on an island just south of the Khazard Fight Arena, Give him the sample and translate his reply.
textByHashes.31eeebc99ec658757e27e85978b2b216ad00cfa9: I just hope he can help us in our hour of need!
textByHashes.bf52d548a90d7d9f54f1beb253b4a235785e58d1: Hello Traveller, did you speak to Hazelmere?
textByHashes.a148a6c726b61622d31877ad577470fc8482613e: Do you understand what he said?
textByHashes.fabcb6d8bf48ed8ec850171ae9b9db5f1dfc8756: Of course! I should've known! Someone must've forged my royal seal. Hazelmere thought I sent him for the Daconia stones!
textByHashes.d4f1d1d75ea40e23e67ed8ea293ec607facc9dff: Hazelmere created the Daconia stones. They are a safety measure, in case the tree grew out of control. They're the only thing that can kill the tree.
textByHashes.9962831cb0c598432fcd542aea51303d2e3a01c5: This is terrible! The stones must be recovered!
textByHashes.0ff2ee0924ea428e60bf172ddff9c6a5aa4202d6: First, I must warn the tree guardians. Please, could you tell the chief tree guardian, Glough. He lives in a tree house just in front of the Grand Tree.
textByHashes.0763aa0ee4f170f975dc2f8f1f8b121200cd2dc4: If he's not there he will be at his girlfriend Anita's place. Meet me back here once you've told him.
textByHashes.0df423f09537efb133a70ead76f729b280063577: Wait a minute! That doesn't sound like Hazelmere! Are you sure you translated correctly?
textByHashes.6c0de346354571ad951aea290d30a75b9f554dc0: I'm sorry Traveller but this is no good. The translation must be perfect or the information's no use. Please come back when you know exactly what Hazelmere said.
textByHashes.ca28d5a46887e06eb83fcf54359e2b1e98521f34: Time is of the essence Traveller!
textByHashes.c5fcd502c129c183229e274c3d303d1ea368e1cb: Hello Traveller, did you speak to Glough?
textByHashes.5a47cbdf6436c68edd3fe6dfba57f46a2cf0be58: OK. He lives just in front of the Grand Tree. Let me know when you've talked to him.
textByHashes.24b00a8d0273473d10e37f6d3a621623ae5dd0d2: It's OK Traveller, thanks to Glough! He found a human sneaking around! He had three Daconia rocks on him!
textByHashes.2ab14777bcf39e1adef873bdbb1281574a99bde6: Yes Glough really knows what he's doing. The human has been detained until we know who else is involved. Maybe Glough was right, maybe humans are invading!
textByHashes.1fb4f280c68b2b66454584e329866440a9086b11: Certainly. He's on the top level of the tree. Be careful, it's a long way down!
textByHashes.3a82971029fb1e16d3bfa55f690257682b3fbe14: Hello Traveller. If you wish to talk to the prisoner go to the top of the tree, you'll find him there.
textByHashes.790b18d11167dfb3c2b3ca57179b1d3c61198f8e: Hello Traveller. So, did you speak to the culprit?
textByHashes.665152f3dfc5d5076ce48744b9df3b02a1847521: That's absurd! He's just trying to save himself!
textByHashes.f5c1efd9d923ebff664b3211b30e1676a680ef18: Since Glough's wife died he's been a little strange. He would never wrongly imprison someone though! Now that the culprit is locked up we can relax. It's sad but I think Glough was right.
textByHashes.bba4a1770fe8db39b8f9aa01b77d55d7d479bb03: Humans are planning to invade and wipe out the tree gnomes!
textByHashes.79a2e1cda4b7aaa7593eb0b751418405f2ae78f9: Who knows? You may have to leave soon Traveller! I trust you but the local gnomes are getting paranoid.
textByHashes.8e8346e9a2b62f6a7ab2d50ee4e7df90d924a154: Why? Don't worry about him now the culprit has been caught. I'm sure Glough's resentment of humans will pass with time.
textByHashes.05f719022d9b58c5c8dd6bdfd37bedcc1303f57b: If you're really concerned speak to him.
textByHashes.3aea50e43bfe9489709a4c07a8304af1e4397838: Traveller please accept my apologies! Glough had no right to arrest you! I just think he's scared of humans. Let me get you out of there.
textByHashes.2073c92b1f11362662794005f93298f6de34865e: I know he can be a bit extreme at times. But he's the best tree guardian I have, he has made the gnomes paranoid about humans though.
textByHashes.a9b1d661f361d5b405f098cc06db9899a9f38be9: I'm afraid Glough has placed guards on the front gate to stop you escaping! Let my glider pilot fly you away until things calm down around here.
textByHashes.157aac6892afde03e43450137ae89f4be3834c24: Glough is looking for you! Leave on the glider now before it's too late!
textByHashes.f13467ed104c46062f1a5e9a65f6f872f8551342: Traveller, what are you doing here? The stronghold has been put on full alert! It's not safe for you here!
textByHashes.8f7f6ba6b06cf9d9725cf472bdd786c4b87e4867: That's enough Traveller, you sound as paranoid as him! Traveller please leave! It's bad enough having one human locked up.
textByHashes.1f9e72074468f255e3e076bafdf31d1dba6fbe08: Please Traveller, if the gnomes see me talking to you they'll revolt against me.
textByHashes.f3811d346c7f20b577e7d87acb179983e9af84ed: Glough's scared the whole town, he expects the humans to attack any day. He's even begun to recruit hundreds of gnome soldiers.
textByHashes.07b5e0fc8f2e1949ea18b04c5196c646a3113fa7: Please Traveller, leave before it's too late!
textByHashes.abfd14ba7665fab04f10d6d744d4654945451157: Look, if you're right about Glough I would have him arrested but there's no reason for me to think he's lying.
textByHashes.b8bdf96ce71034b2eb714d5fadcdf0979af907b6: If these are to be believed then this is terrible! But it's not proof, any one could have made these. Traveller, I understand your concern, I had guards search Glough's house but they found nothing suspicious, just these odd twigs. On the other hand, if Glough's right about the humans we will need an army of gnomes to protect ourselves. So I've decided to allow Glough to raise a mighty gnome army. The Grand Tree's still slowly dying, if it is human sabotage we must respond!
textByHashes.45c771b76b4461d48d4581de213fc9afec9574eb: Please Traveller, take my advice and leave!
textByHashes.4e326bec1d7813781ffc8256e6942799b28bb48d: Here take these, I don't see how it will help you though.
textByHashes.d3deed7a190f5551ab9ed9672ad6069c7391ba8b: Hmm. Looks like you can't carry anymore. Put 4 things down and come back to me.
textByHashes.9cb8b5784100342024aeb1d5ad8bdef1e497065c: I'm sorry Traveller but it's just not realistic. How could Glough, even with a gnome army, take over?
textByHashes.40a1e52ddfa1c629e0fbdd0698b5ca19d9573de7: That's enough Traveller! I've no time for make believe. The tree's still dying. I must get to the truth of this!
textByHashes.e935a7775484322ee8223b282101c4fc7d2d0bcc: Never! Not Glough! He's a good gnome at heart! Guard!
textByHashes.2c41394a5cba87476cfcb81bbdd7fdb4acb0bdc1: Go and check out that passage!
textByHashes.8a012b656e269e35757df323d2e6a46116821f8a: I..I don't know what to say! How could I have been so blind?! Guard! Call off the military training! The humans are not attacking!
textByHashes.b27ec019858c5b1af8e4fcea42f9475386bac004: You have my full apologies Traveller! And my gratitude! A reward will have to wait though, the tree is still dying! The guards are clearing Glough's rock supply now but there must be more Daconia hidden somewhere in the roots! Help us search, we have little time!
textByHashes.f5e0c566d9e915c57fdf0dc5fa352405873cc305: Traveller, have you managed to find the Daconia?
textByHashes.200483b2e22ca506b6281fc8974843ff511b89cd: The tree will still die if we don't find it! It could be anywhere!
textByHashes.4b61576c6766d3ecea50f418be5dc21f61598b76: It's incredible, the tree's health is improving already! I don't know what to say, we owe you so much! To think Glough had me fooled all along!
textByHashes.bbea1f21095135c28a9c236e13ec088ea6af68e9: I'll drink to that! From now on I vow to make this stronghold a welcoming place for all! I'll grant you access to all our facilities.
textByHashes.4428c02b95d4aa7fa494535c422030b149e0a9a0: It should make your stay here easier. You can use the spirit tree to transport yourself, as well as the gnome glider. I also give you access to our mine.
textByHashes.ee717e3f3b86d328aaded47c7b734661b1260981: Very few know of the secret mine under the Grand Tree. If you push on the roots just to my north they will separate and let you pass.
textByHashes.45961ca7126915baca953e3f79c83fcc98cf5dcd: That's magic trees for you! All the best Traveller and thanks again!
textByHashes.967810cdd4715c1755a011282aa9ecee3ba7bb26: All is well in the Stronghold thanks to you, .
